# Content Style Guide — StocksWithGaurav

## What Makes Top Stock Market Pages Work (Patterns from Reference Images)

### Visual DNA of High-Performing Posts

**@stockmarket_information (243-2,471 likes per post):**
- Dark backgrounds (#0a0a0a black, not navy blue)
- Text-heavy data cards (no complex graphics — just formatted text on dark bg)
- Yellow (#ffff00) section headers, cyan (#00e5ff) stock names, green/red for numbers
- Swipe indicator on every slide (red arrow + "SWIPE 👉" with hand emoji)
- 10-16 slide carousels (more content = more engagement time = algorithm boost)
- Minimal imagery — mostly text + data tables
- Reel-style audio-enabled carousels (music icon visible)
- Brand watermark: small logo top-right corner

**@stockmarket.infomania (700-1,200 likes per post):**
- Real photo backgrounds (BSE building, world leaders, relevant imagery)
- Bold headline at bottom 40% of image
- Title in WHITE bold all-caps, subtitle in YELLOW/RED
- 2-3 detail lines in smaller white text
- Date badge always visible (top-right)
- Logo top-left (semi-transparent)
- Single-image posts for breaking news (not carousel)
- Reels perform best for breaking/event-driven content

### Key Differences from Current StocksWithGaurav Engine

| Current (bookish) | Target (news-style) |
|---|---|
| Navy blue gradient bg | Pure black/dark bg |
| Neon cyan accent everywhere | Multi-color: yellow headers, cyan data, green/red numbers |
| Academic SMC education style | News-anchor breaking-news energy |
| 4-slide strategy carousels | 5-7 slide data-heavy carousels |
| Abstract diagram charts | Real data, numbers, stock names |
| "SMART MONEY IS LOADING HERE" hooks | "WHY MARKET CRASHED TODAY?" hooks |
| Static hook templates | Dynamic data-driven headlines |
| Educational cheatsheets | Market reports people screenshot and share |

### The "Screenshot-Worthy" Test

Every slide should pass: **"Would someone screenshot this and send it to their trading WhatsApp group?"**

Things people screenshot:
- FII/DII net buy/sell data
- Top gainers/losers with %
- Key levels for NIFTY/BANKNIFTY
- Brokerage target prices
- Stocks in news with 1-line catalyst
- High delivery % stocks list

Things people DON'T screenshot:
- Generic strategy explainers
- "How to identify Order Block" posts
- Motivational trading quotes
- Vague market commentary

---

## Typography Rules

### Headline Hierarchy

| Level | Size (relative) | Weight | Color | Use |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| H1 | 72-80px | Black/Heavy | White | Main headline ("PRE MARKET REPORT") |
| H2 | 48-56px | Bold | Yellow #ffff00 | Section headers ("WORLD MARKETS") |
| H3 | 36-42px | Bold | Cyan/Green | Sub-headers ("U.S MARKETS") |
| Body | 28-32px | Regular | White #ffffff | News text, descriptions |
| Data | 28-32px | Bold | Green/Red | Numbers, percentages |
| Fine print | 18-22px | Regular | Grey #888888 | Disclaimer, source |

### Color Palette

```
PRIMARY:
  Background:    #0a0a0a (near-black) or #1a1a1a
  Text:          #ffffff (white)

SEMANTIC:
  Bullish:       #00ff00 (bright green)
  Bearish:       #ff0000 (bright red)
  Warning:       #ff6600 (orange)
  Highlight:     #ffff00 (yellow) — section headers
  Data/Stock:    #00e5ff (cyan) — stock names, data values
  Commentary:    #cccccc (light grey) — secondary text

ACCENTS:
  Brand green:   #00cc66
  Brand blue:    #0066ff (for news badge)
  Amber:         #ff9900 (for alerts/warnings)
```

### Layout Constants (1080 × 1080px)

```
MARGINS:
  Top:           40px
  Left:          40px  
  Right:         40px
  Bottom:        80px (brand bar space)

SPACING:
  Section gap:   30px
  Row gap:       16px
  Column gap:    20px

ELEMENTS:
  Logo:          top-right, 80×80px, 30% opacity
  Date badge:    top-right below logo, pill shape, white text on dark
  Swipe arrow:   right edge, center-vertical, red with hand emoji
  Brand bar:     bottom 60px, centered handles text
  Disclaimer:    bottom 25px, grey 18px text
```

---

## Content Types — Quick Decision Matrix

| Scenario | Content Type | Slides | Priority |
|---|---|---|---|
| Normal trading day | Pre-market + Post-market carousels | 5-7 each | Daily routine |
| Market crashes >2% | Crash analysis carousel + reel | 5-8 | Immediate |
| Major news (RBI, SEBI, Budget) | Breaking news single + analysis carousel | 1 + 5-7 | Within 30 min |
| Earnings season | Earnings recap carousel | 5-7 | After results |
| Weekend | Weekly recap + educational | 5-7 | Saturday morning |
| IPO listing | IPO analysis carousel | 3-5 | Day of listing |
| Brokerage calls batch | Brokerage calls carousel | 3-5 | After market hours |
| Geopolitical event | Impact analysis carousel | 5-8 | Within 1 hour |

---

## Instagram Algorithm Notes (2026)

- **Carousels** consistently outperform single images (2-3x reach)
- Minimum 5 slides for algorithm to prefer it
- **Saves > Shares > Comments > Likes** in ranking weight
- Data-rich content gets more saves (screenshot effect)
- Breaking news gets more shares
- Ask questions in caption for comments ("Which stock are you watching?")
- Post timing: 8:00-8:30 AM (pre-market), 3:30-4:00 PM (post-market), 7:00-8:00 PM (engagement peak)
- Reels audio on carousels improves visibility
- Hashtag limit: 30, but 25-28 is sweet spot
- First line of caption is the hook — make it emotional or data-driven
